examples: Did she usurp his place in his mother's heart?
Industrialism began to usurp the production and distribution functions of the family.
Powerful entities threaten reality's foundation as they seek to usurp the Raven Queen 's position.
Mr. Rivers worried that the corporal's father would see him as trying to usurp his role.
Who was this Sonny Werblin to usurp the Church of Halas and snatch the boy away?
